title: Send note about NPC avatars to render agent

log.context: Send note about NPC avatars to render agent

Task created with full requirements. Here's a summary of the findings:

**Root cause:** CommonsV2's `drawNPC` in `/mnt/data/labs/commons-v2/src/renderer.ts` (lines 104–136) draws a plain 16×16 colored box using a hash of `npc.name`. It has no sprite system at all.

**V1's approach (grazing.html):**
- Loads three `sprites-batch*.js` files as globals. Each contains `drawSprite_<id>_<letter>(ctx, cx, cy)` functions using only `fillRect`. Sprites are ~20×40px, drawn from feet position upward.
